name: Custom Go Sensor
description: A template for creating custom HoneyWire sensors in Go.

documentation.summary: This is a blueprint for writing your own HoneyWire sensors in Go. By following this template, you'll easily hook into the official Go SDK, ensuring events are synced securely with the HoneyWire Hub.

sections.title: Features
content: Easy SDK Integration: Automatically hooks into the event bus.

sections.title: Security Architecture
content: Unprivileged Execution: Runs completely as non-root user (UID 65532).
Kernel Capability Stripping: Drops ALL Linux kernel capabilities.
Read-Only Context: Operates in a strict distroless environment.

env_vars.name: HW_HUB_ENDPOINT
env_vars.description: The URL of your central HoneyWire Hub.

env_vars.name: HW_SENSOR_ID
env_vars.description: Unique identifier for this specific trap.

env_vars.name: HW_CUSTOM_TARGET
env_vars.description: Example custom variable injected into the Go runtime.
